name: Banana Custard Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, flour, and cornstarch in a medium mixing bowl. Mix well and set aside.
2. Pour milk into a large saucepan; cook over medium heat until a candy thermometer registers 160°F. Gradually stir one-fourth of the hot milk into yolks; stir into the reserved dry ingredients, then add to the remaining hot milk. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and coats the spoon. Remove from heat and stir in butter and vanilla. Let cool to room temperature.
3. Line the bottom of a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking dish with one-third of the Vanilla Wafers. Arrange half of the banana slices over the wafers; top with half of the cooled custard.
4. Repeat layers, reserving one-third of the wafers to crumble and sprinkle over the custard. Chill thoroughly. Yield: 20 to 25 servings.
